dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your personalised scheme tracker
dashboard.noSavedDesc: Click the bookmark icon on any scheme card to save it here.
dashboard.noRecentDesc: Schemes you view will appear here automatically.
dashboard.noProgressDesc: Start an application guide from any scheme card to track your progress.

landing.heroDesc: Personalized recommendations tailored to your profile. Navigate the complex landscape of subsidies, grants, and social welfare with ease.
landing.topSchemesDesc: Based on current trends and demographic eligibility in your region.
landing.smartDiscoveryDesc: No more searching through endless PDF documents. SmartSchemes instantly matches your profile against thousands of active government schemes from Central and State portals.
landing.instantMatchDesc: Get results in under 2 seconds across 2,000+ active schemes.
landing.multiLingualDesc: Access complex information in your preferred local Indian language.
landing.successRate: Success rate in identifying eligible schemes
landing.vocalForLocal: Vocal for Local: Digital MSME Transformation
landing.vocalDesc: Access zero-interest loans and technology grants to take your local business to the global market. Over 2,000 businesses joined last month.

explore.title: Explore Government Schemes
explore.subtitle: Choose your category and get personalized recommendations
explore.businessDetailsDesc: For MSME, startup, and enterprise schemes
explore.educationDetailsDesc: For scholarships and education loan schemes

results.noResultsDesc: Fill the form first to get recommendations

footer.desc: Empowering Indian citizens through transparent and efficient access to government opportunities. Our platform ensures you never miss a benefit you're eligible for.
